device_description: Global® Total® for Fertilization is a sterile, ready-to-use assisted reproduction (ART) liquid medium intended for oocyte culture and fertilization. It is manufactured aseptically and supplied sterile. The formulation includes balanced physiological salts; energy substrates (glucose, lactate, pyruvate); a bicarbonate buffer; EDTA; amino acids; the antibiotic gentamicin sulfate (10 µg/mL); Plasma Protein Fraction (PPF: Human Serum Albumin ~4.4 mg/mL plus alpha- and beta-globulins ~0.6 mg/mL); and Phenol Red. The medium provides physiologic osmolality and pH and supports gamete function during in vitro procedures.
intended_purpose: Global® Total® for Fertilization is applied in ART treatment intended for human oocyte culture and fertilization. The intended purpose is achieved by providing a liquid environment with physiological osmolality and pH, and energy components supporting the biological function of gametes during in vitro procedures involving the fertilization of human oocytes.
indications_for_use: Use in Assisted Reproductive Technology (ART) for human oocyte culture and fertilization (IVF and ICSI).
Use for patients/couples assessed suitable by a gynecologist to undergo IVF.
contraindications: Cautions: product contains human blood–derived proteins (PPF) and gentamicin; see IFU warnings.
target_patient_population: Persons/couples undergoing ART who have been assessed by a gynecologist as suitable for IVF/ICSI, irrespective of male or female infertility factor.
intended_user_profile: Professionals trained in ART procedures, including embryologists, gynecologists, and laboratory technicians.
eu_mdr_classification_and_rule: Not CE-marked; EU MDR classification/rule not assigned in the CER
uk_mdr_classification_and_rule: Not applicable (not provided in the CER)
ukca_marking_status: Not applicable / not provided in the CER

device_lifetime.shelf_life: Not stated in the CER; unused medium must be discarded within 7 days of opening per IFU warnings
device_lifetime.expected_service_life: Not applicable (single-use consumable medium per container)

sterility_status: Sterile; manufactured aseptically and supplied as a sterile, ready-to-use liquid
single_use_or_reusable: Single-use per container (do not resterilize; discard unused within 7 days of opening)
market_history: Available and in clinical use since 2012; 510(k) cleared by FDA (K112083) on 2012-05-03 and Health Canada MDL 73389 issued on 2012-03-27. The device has >13 years of market use with no new risks identified through PMS and is classified in the CER as a well-established technology.
